document.heading: Authorization of USET Contract with Limited Waiver of Sovereign Immunity
document.text: A Resolution to authorize execution of a contract with United South and Eastern Tribes, Inc. (USET) and to provide a limited waiver of sovereign immunity for purposes thereof.
At a duly called General Meeting of the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council held this 24th day of January 2026, the following law was adopted by a vote of the Council as reflected herein:

recital.text: the Upper Mattaponi Tribe (the "Tribe") is a federally recognized Indian Tribe with inherent sovereign authority, including the authority to enter into contracts and agreements; and

pursuant to Article XIII, Section 1 the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe (the "Constitution"), only the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council (the "Council") and Chief may authorize a waiver of the Tribe's sovereign immunity, and any such waiver must be specific, limited in scope and duration, and in writing; and

the Tribe has the opportunity to enter into a Contract for Products and/or Services (the "Contract") with United South and Eastern Tribes, Inc. ("USET") for the installation of a rainwater catchment and irrigation system and related community education activities; and
the purpose of the Contract is to address water and soil conservation issues, reduce erosion and runoff, and support the Tribe's food sovereignty and agricultural sustainability goals; and
the Contract includes provisions requiring a limited waiver of the Tribe's sovereign immunity solely for purposes of dispute resolution arising under the Contract; and

the Council has reviewed the terms of the Contract and finds that entering into the Contract and granting a limited waiver of sovereign immunity as set forth herein is in the best interests of the Tribe;
that the Upper Mattaponi Tribal Council hereby authorizes the Tribe to enter into the Contract with United South and Eastern Tribes, Inc., substantially in the form presented to the Council; and
that the Chief of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe, or his designee, is hereby authorized to execute the Contract and any related documents necessary to carry out its purposes; and

that, solely for the purpose of resolving disputes arising under or related to the Contract, the Tribe hereby grants a limited waiver of its sovereign immunity, subject to the following express limitations:

para.text: The waiver is strictly limited to claims arising directly under the Contract;
The waiver does not extend to any officer, employee, or agent of the Tribe; and
All sovereign immunity not expressly waived is reserved.

procedural-data.text: The foregoing Resolution was duly voted upon by the Council on the 24th day of January, 2025, at a General Meeting with a vote of 7 in favor and 0 opposed, 0 abstaining, and 0 absent, pursuant to the authority vested in the Council by the Constitution of the Upper Mattaponi Tribe.
